description_long: This is a German police van with a white body and blue accents, featuring the word 'POLIZEI' prominently on the sides, front, and rear. The van has a high roof and large tinted windows along both sides, providing visibility and space for passengers or equipment. Blue emergency lights are mounted on the roof, both at the front and rear, and a blue stripe runs horizontally along the length of the vehicle. The front grille displays a recognizable circular logo, and the van is equipped with standard black tires and silver hubcaps. The rear of the van features large windowed doors, likely for loading and unloading personnel or cargo. The overall design is functional and robust, suitable for urban law enforcement duties.
description: A white and blue German police van with large tinted windows, blue emergency lights, and 'POLIZEI' markings on all sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, with 'POLIZEI' text, blue stripe, and two large tinted windows.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the windshield, blue hood with 'POLIZEI', grille, and roof-mounted emergency lights.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right profile, similar to the left, with 'POLIZEI' text and blue stripe.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back windows, 'POLIZEI' marking, and rear emergency lights.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
